reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
저희 냥이 모래의 애착장난감입니다,,
장난감 디자인도 넘 귀엽고 삑삑이 소리나 바스락 소리를 좋아해서 혼자 던지고 물고 난리에요!
삑삑이 소리내면 멀리서부터 달려옵니다ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
사이즈도 크지 않아서 냥생 8개월차 냥이도 신나게 가지고 놀아요!!
장난감을 하도 물고빨고 여기저기 굴러다니다보니 벌써 꼬질꼬질해져서 좀 더 있다가 다른 색상으로 구매해볼 예정입니다🤍
reviews.content_en: Our kitty's favorite attachment toy,, The toy design is so cute and she loves the squeaky and crinkly sounds - she throws it around and bites it like crazy! When it squeaks, she runs over from far away ㅋㅋㅋㅋ The size isn't too big so even our 8-month-old kitty loves playing with it!! Since the toy gets bitten and crinkled around so much, it's getting pretty dirty already, so I'm planning to buy it in a different color soon 🤍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
진짜 넘 귀여워요.. ㅠㅠㅠ 저희 강쥐한테 완전 애착인형 됐오요..>_< 
집에서도 꼭 껴안고 자야해요 ㅋㅎㅎㅋㅎㅋ
인형이 넘 제 취향이라 샀는데ㅋㅋ 
노즈워크 장난감 말고는 인형에 관심도 없는 애가
이거는 혼자 물고와서 같이 놀자고 난리에오
기여운애가 기여운걸 가지고 노니까,, 엄마 심장 뿌셔!!!!! 
진짜 우리애기 더 귀여운 모습 보고싶다면 꼭 사세요ㅜ 
완전 애기 느낌 낭낭한게,, 3종셋뚜셋뚜로 쟁여놔야겠오요..!
reviews.content_en: It's seriously so cute.. ㅠㅠㅠ It became a complete attachment toy for our pup..>_< She has to cuddle and sleep with it at home ㅋㅎㅎㅋㅎㅋ I bought it because the design is totally my style ㅋㅋ She usually has no interest in toys except sniff toys, but this one she carries in her mouth and wants to play with it constantly My heart is melting seeing my cute baby with her cute toy!!!!! If you want to see your baby being even cuter, please buy this ㅜ It's so soft and baby-like,, I'm planning to get all 3 types!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우리 애기 원픽!!!🐘🩵

이번에 생일을 맞이하고 선물을 많이 사줬는데 그중에서도 제일 좋아하는 장난감이에요:)

진짜 애기 장난감 같아서 너무 귀엽고 강아지들이 좋아하는 소리도 나서 너무 좋아용!
reviews.content_en: Our baby's number one pick!!!🐘🩵 We got her a birthday and bought lots of gifts, but this is her favorite toy :) It's shaped like a real baby toy so it's super cute, and it makes sounds that dogs love so we're really happy with it!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
애기들 딸랑이처럼 생겨서 너무귀여움
터그놀이할때 좋음 튼튼해서 오래쓸듯!
reviews.content_en: So cute with its bell-like shape The toy is great for tug games and seems durable so it'll last a long time!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 매장에서 구매했던 토끼인형이 완전 애착인형이 되서 오래 잘 쓰다가 터져서 알아보다가 2개나 구입했는데 둘다 5분만에 터져서 아쉬워요ㅠㅠ 저희 강아지가 강해졌나... 이 인형 엄청 좋아해요 또 구매하고 싶은데 바로 또 터질까봐 선뜻 구매를 못하겠네요 흙흙
reviews.content_en: The rabbit toy I bought at the store became such an attachment toy that she used it for a long time until it ripped, so I looked for a replacement and bought 2 more but both ripped in just 5 minutes ㅠㅠ Did our pup get stronger...? She really loves this toy and I want to buy it again but I'm hesitant because I'm worried it'll rip right away again 흑흑

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
강아지가 너무 좋아해요!
바잇미제품은 믿고 다 구매하는데 한번도 맘에 안든가 없었네요!
딱딱한건 아예 거들떠도 안보고 터그놀리는 좋아해서 항상 인형 쟁여두는데 이건 손잡이도 있어서 너무 좋아요!
여유있게 3개사서 쟁여놉니다
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much! I trust BITE ME products and buy them all the time, and I've never been disappointed! She completely ignores hard toys and loves tug games so I always keep stuffed toys on hand but this one has a handle so it's perfect! I bought 3 to keep stocked

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
우선 사람이 만족하려고 사요 넘나 귀엽 ㅋㅋ 
입이 작은 우리 애깅들 한테 삑삑이는 좀 크네요 
바스락이 약해서 아쉬워요
reviews.content_en: First of all, I bought it to make myself happy because it's so cute ㅋㅋ The squeaker is a bit big for our little ones with small mouths The crinkly sound is weak so that's a shame

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
구멍에 손가락 넣어서 돌려주면 좋아해요 
코 뽁 하기 좋아요 
귀여워요 보들보들 한데 처음에 털이 많이 빠져요
reviews.content_en: She loves it when I put my finger in the hole and twist it Loves when I boop the nose It's so cute and soft but it sheds a lot of fur at first

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 새 장난감 필요해서 보다가 쿠폰받고 할인 더 받아서 구매했어요 굿굿 장난감 완전 귀여워요 ㅠ잘 노네요
reviews.content_en: Needed a new toy so I was looking around and got a coupon plus extra discount so I bought it good good The toy is absolutely adorable ㅠ She plays with it really well

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 장난감 집에 많은데 이건 너무 귀여워서 구매해버림!! 삑삑이 바스락 강쥐가 좋아하는거 둘다 포함이라 뜯어주자마자 환장하고 달려들어요~ 사람 아기 장난감마냥 진짜 기엽네요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: I have tons of toys at home but this one was so cute I just had to buy it!! It has both the squeaky and crinkly sounds that dogs love so she went crazy and attacked it right when I opened it~ It's so cute like a human baby toy ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 강아지가 물기 쉽게되어잇구 소리도나오구 퀄리티시 조아요 ㅋㅋ 다른모양도 살것 같아요!! 강아지가 좋아해서 만복스러우요
reviews.content_en: The dog can bite it easily and it makes sounds and the quality is great ㅋㅋ I think I'll buy other shapes too!! I'm so happy because my dog loves it

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content:
퀄리티 너무좋네요 뭔가고급져요
근데 사람애기 장난감같아요ㅋㅋ
딸랑이 라고 적혀있는데 삑삑이 라서 더좋아요
reviews.content_en: The quality is really good it feels kind of luxurious But it looks like a human baby toy ㅋㅋ It says "bell" on it but it's actually a squeaker which is even better

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 좋아요~ 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요. 장난감은 항상 여기서만 주문합니다^^ 삑삑이 최고 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and great~ My dog loves playing with it. I always order toys from here ^^ Squeakers are the best ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content: 오랜만에 장난감 사줬는데 신나서 난리가 났었어요ㅎㅎ 너무너무 귀엽네요 제발 토끼 귀 물어뜯지 않기를🙏
reviews.content_en: It's been a while since I bought her a toy and she went crazy with excitement ㅎㅎ It's so so cute Please let the bunny ears not get chewed off 🙏

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 뽀스락 소리 삑삑 소리가 좋은지 알아서 소리나는 데 골라서 물고 놀더라구요. 실컷 놀다 지루해지면 던져 달라고 제 손에 물어다 갖다주는 것도 넘 귀여워요 ^^
reviews.content_en: She must like the crinkly and squeaky sounds because she purposely picks out the spots that make sounds to bite and play with When she gets tired from playing she brings it to my hand asking me to throw it which is so adorable ^^

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요ㅠㅠ
강아지가 좋아하는 빠시락소리고 잘나고 
손잡이 있어서 너무 귀업습니다,,
reviews.content_en: It's so cute ㅠㅠ My dog loves the crinkly sound it makes The handle is so handy and cute,,

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
토끼 너무 귀여워요 
색도 마음에 들고
아가가 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: The bunny is so cute The colors are nice and my baby loves it

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 탄탄한 소재로 찢어지지 않을 것 같아요 ~~ 울 애기가 엄청 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: The material is sturdy so it doesn't seem like it'll tear ~~ Our baby loves it so much

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽네요… 가운데 구멍 때문에 터그놀이 해주기도 더 쉬웠어요!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute… The hole in the middle made it easier to play tug games too!

reviews.name: O****
reviews.content: 넘호 예뻐서 재구매예정입니다
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty I'm planning to reorder it

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
삑삑이소리가 나긴하는데 누르기힘드네요
토끼라서 귀여워요 색상도 이쁘고
사이즈도 적당하고 좋음
reviews.content_en: It does make a squeaky sound but it's hard to press The bunny is cute and the colors are pretty The size is just right and I like it

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
귀여운 아기장난감 같은 강아지 장난감 !! 
하늘색 코끼리가 넘 기여워서 구매했습니당 
바스락은 별로 없고 삑삑이가 괜찮은편 !
reviews.content_en: It's like a cute baby toy for dogs!! I bought the light blue elephant because it's so adorable The crinkle isn't great but the squeaker works pretty well!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 토끼보자마자 달려드는 댕댕이ㅎㅎ 엄청 귀요미 장난감입니다~잘갖고 놀아서 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: The pup runs up as soon as she sees the bunny ㅎㅎ It's an incredibly cute toy~ I'm happy she plays with it well ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 봉봉그린 장난감은 처음 구매해봤는데 강아지가 너무너무 좋아해요!😆 이번에 봉봉그린에서 신상 장난감 또 나왔던데 하나더 구매해야겠어요💕
reviews.content_en: This is my first time buying a BONBON GREEN toy and my dog loves it so much!😆 I saw they came out with new toys from BONBON GREEN so I need to buy another one 💕

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
댕댕이가 좋아해요. 아주 잘 가지고 놀고있어요.
다만 강아지가 몇번 물으니 올이 금방 풀리는 재질이라 조금 아쉬워요.
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it and plays with it really well. The only thing is that the material unravels pretty quickly when the dog bites it a few times which is a shame

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
보자마자 구ㅏ여워서 구매 ㅎㅎㅎ
장난감 많기도하고 아까워서 아직 안뜯구있어요 ㅋㅋㅋ
칭구 애기선물로도 좋을거같아요
reviews.content_en: Bought it right away because it was so cute ㅎㅎㅎ I have a lot of toys and it felt like a waste so I haven't opened it yet ㅋㅋㅋ It would be good as a gift for a friend's baby too

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 두개 번갈아가며 물고 흔들고 너무 잘놀아요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: She alternates biting and shaking the two of them and plays so well with them ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 새****
reviews.content:
애기 딸랑이 장난감처럼 생겨서 귀여워요
바스락 삑삑이가 같은 위치에 있어서 좋아용
reviews.content_en: It's cute because it looks like a baby rattle toy The crinkle and squeaker are in the same spot which is nice

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 애기가 너무 좋아해서 만족해요
reviews.content_en: My baby loves it so much so I'm satisfied

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 곰돌이 장난감도 너무좋아해여!
reviews.content_en: She loves the teddy bear toy too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 삑삑이에 바스락까지 있고 소형견에게 딱 알맞은 크기라서 좋아요🩷
reviews.content_en: It has a squeaker and crinkly material, and the size is perfect for small dogs! 🩷

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 종류별로 다 사줫는데 질도 좋고 강아지가 재밌어해요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought all the different types and the quality is great. My dog really enjoys them! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 링부분 좀더 컷으면 더좋앗을거같아요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! I think it would've been even better if the ring part was a bit bigger.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 작아서 잘 가지고 놀것 같아요
reviews.content_en: It's small so my pup should have a lot of fun playing with it!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 튼튼하고 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's durable and great! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아이가 잘가지고 놀아요~
reviews.content_en: My pup plays with it really well~

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 아이가 방울을 좋아하고 이름도 딸랑이 장난감이라 구매했는데 삑삑이와 바스락만 들었어요 그래도 아이가 좋아해요 작고 가볍고 귀여워서 외출할 때 챙기기 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: My dog loves bells and since it's called a jingly toy, I bought it, but it only has a squeaker and crinkly material. Still, my pup loves it! It's small, light, and cute, so it's great to bring on outings~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
핵 귀여운데 핵 잘가지고 놀아요
다른 색상도 구매 하고싶네용~~~~
reviews.content_en:
It's super cute and my dog plays with it so well!
I want to buy other colors too~~~~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무너무 기여운장난감~입이작은아이라 입에 딱맞아서 잘갖고 놀아요~
reviews.content_en: Such an adorable toy~ My pup has a small mouth so it fits perfectly and plays with it well~

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 너무 기여운인형 잘가지고놀아요 제기 키링으로쓰고싶네용 기여워서
reviews.content_en: Such a cute plushie and my dog plays with it well! I want to use it as my keychain because it's so adorable

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
너무 사랑스럽네요
디자인이 이뻐요
reviews.content_en:
I love it so much
The design is really pretty

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 다 귀엽긴한데 세개중 한개가 삑삑소리가안났어요 ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: They're all cute, but one of the three didn't make a squeaking sound ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무 좋아해서 금방 튿어졌네요
reviews.content_en: My dog loved it so much that it got torn quickly

reviews.name: O****
reviews.content: 재구매 예정이에요.굿굿
reviews.content_en: I'm planning to repurchase. Good good

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 신상 아주좋아합니다ㅜ굳
reviews.content_en: Really love the new product ㅜ Good

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 토끼두 넘넘좋아해여!
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves the bunny!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 코끼리 좋아하는 강아지 꺼에요 딸랑 소리 재미있어요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves the elephant! The jingling sound is fun

reviews.name: 함****
reviews.content:
소리나는 장난감은 처음 사 보는데 댕댕이가
좋아할거 같아요~
reviews.content_en: This is my first time buying a toy that makes sounds and I think my pup is going to love it~

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 새류운 장난감을 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: My dog likes new toys!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무 귀요미인데 잘 안가지고 놀아요 ㅠㅠ
우리 애는 공만 좋은가봐요 ㅠ
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable but my pup doesn't really play with it much ㅠㅠ I guess my pup just likes balls ㅠ
